message:
test(fcp-conformance/host-agent-session): pin AgentSessionConfig defaults+validate + ToolCallError + build_error_response helpers (resolves flywheel_connectors-xhkwb)

24 tests pinning three tightly-coupled agent-facing primitives.

- AgentSessionConfig::default: idle_timeout=5min, max_lifetime=1h,
  max_concurrent_calls=10, rate_limit_per_minute=60; default config
  is self-valid
- validate() rejection contract for 5 invariants: zero idle_timeout,
  zero max_lifetime, max_lifetime<idle_timeout (session would expire
  before becoming idle), zero max_concurrent_calls, zero
  rate_limit_per_minute; accumulates multiple errors; is_valid ⇔
  validate().is_empty()
- AgentSessionConfig serializes Duration as u64 seconds via
  duration_secs serde helper; full roundtrip
- ToolCallError::new (data=None) and ::with_data (structured payload)
- to_jsonrpc_error extracts numeric McpErrorCode + message + data
  into McpJsonRpcError envelope; passes through None data
- ToolCallError Display: '[{McpErrorCode-Display}] {message}' exact
  format ('[Tool not found (-32001)] no such tool')
- build_error_response: jsonrpc='2.0', preserves id (string OR
  number), error code/message; data omitted when None
- build_error_response_with_data: includes data payload; serialized
  form matches JSON-RPC 2.0 envelope

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
